#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable CS0612, CS0618 // Use of obsolete APIs is natural when we're emitting delegates for obsolete properties.
#pragma warning disable CS0436 // Use of local types when imported types by the same name exist.

namespace TestNamespace
{
    [global::PolyType.Abstractions.TypeShapeProvider(typeof(__LocalTypeShapeProvider__))]
    public partial class Secrets
    {
        [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
        private sealed class __LocalTypeShapeProvider__ : global::PolyType.ITypeShapeProvider
        {
            global::PolyType.ITypeShape? global::PolyType.ITypeShapeProvider.GetTypeShape(global::System.Type type)
            {
                if (type == typeof(global::TestNamespace.Secrets))
                {
                    return global::PolyType.SourceGenerator.TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly.Default.Secrets;
                }

                return null;
            }
        }
    }
}
